name: chr20_olfactory_cluster
description: Chr20 olfactory cluster, ~50 OR genes (distinct from RT1 MHC cluster). Rat has ~1300 OR genes total, the largest mammalian repertoire after mouse. Intra-cluster paralog identity 60-98%; recent tandem duplicates exceed 95% identity and require PSV mapping.
expected_copy_count: 30-150 OR genes per cluster; CNVs of small sub-blocks segregate at strain level
